Container.Name: Octave
Container.Overview: Sync Spotify playlists into Jellyfin, request missing albums in Lidarr, and enrich matching with ListenBrainz and Last.fm. Browser-based setup — no config file editing needed.
Container.Description:
Octave keeps your Spotify playlists mirrored into Jellyfin with three sync modes (add-only, full-sync, rebuild), automatic cover art, missing-track reports, and optional Lidarr album requests.
[b]Key features:[/b] [ul] [li]Spotify PKCE OAuth — connect via the web UI, no developer account required[/li] [li]Fuzzy track matching with configurable threshold[/li] [li]Parallel Lidarr album requests with per-artist state machine[/li] [li]ListenBrainz MusicBrainz ID resolution and Last.fm enrichment[/li] [li]Scheduled sync via cron, plus manual trigger from the dashboard[/li] [li]SQLite sync history, SSE log tail, missing tracks CSV export[/li] [li]HTTP Basic Auth for the web interface[/li] [li]All credentials configurable from the UI — no .env file required[/li] [/ul]
[b]Setup:[/b] After starting the container, open the web UI, go to Settings, click [b]Sign in to Jellyfin[/b] and [b]Auto-detect URL[/b] to configure credentials automatically. Then click [b]Connect Spotify[/b] to authorize. See the README for full setup instructions.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: spotify jellyfin lidarr sync playlist music listenbrainz lastfm

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Octave web interface and API.

Config.Name: Spotify OAuth Callback Port
Config.Description: Temporary PKCE OAuth callback listener. Used only during Spotify login — can be removed after first auth if not using a reverse proxy. Add http://[SERVER-IP]:8888/callback to your Spotify app redirect URIs, or set SPOTIFY_REDIRECT_URI to your reverse-proxy callback URL.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Stores config.json (non-secret settings: Jellyfin library ID, playlists list).

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Runtime data: SQLite sync history, credentials (settings.json), Spotify PKCE token, track cache.

Config.Name: Logs Path
Config.Description: Octave log files (rotated automatically).

Config.Name: Spotify Client ID
Config.Description: Optional — can be set later in the Octave Settings UI. Your Spotify app Client ID from developer.spotify.com/dashboard. Leave blank if you plan to use the bundled app (if shipped) or configure later.

Config.Name: Spotify Redirect URI
Config.Description: Optional. Leave blank to let Octave infer the callback URI. Set this explicitly when using a reverse proxy, e.g. https://octave.example.com/callback.

Config.Name: Jellyfin URL
Config.Description: Optional — use 'Sign in to Jellyfin' in the Settings UI to configure automatically. URL reachable from the Octave container, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:8096 or http://jellyfin:8096.

Config.Name: Jellyfin API Key
Config.Description: Optional — auto-filled by 'Sign in to Jellyfin' in Settings. Jellyfin Dashboard → API Keys.

Config.Name: Jellyfin User ID
Config.Description: Optional — auto-filled by 'Sign in to Jellyfin' in Settings. The user ID that will own created playlists.

Config.Name: Lidarr URL
Config.Description: Optional — leave unset to disable Lidarr integration. URL reachable from the Octave container, e.g. http://lidarr:8686.

Config.Name: Lidarr API Key
Config.Description: Optional Lidarr API key. Lidarr → Settings → General → Security → API Key.

Config.Name: Auth Username
Config.Description: HTTP Basic Auth username for the web UI. Defaults to 'octave'.

Config.Name: Auth Password
Config.Description: HTTP Basic Auth password. Leave blank for open access (LAN-trust mode). Set this before exposing Octave outside your LAN.

Config.Name: Sync Schedule
Config.Description: Cron schedule for automatic sync (uses container TZ). Default: 2:00 AM daily. Leave blank to disable scheduled sync.

Config.Name: Sync On Startup
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to run a sync when the container starts.

Config.Name: Sync All Playlists
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to discover and sync every Spotify playlist the connected account can see. Spotify-owned editorial playlists are skipped automatically.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: IANA timezone string for logs and scheduled syncs, e.g. Australia/Sydney.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Python logging level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, or ERROR.

Config.Name: ListenBrainz Token
Config.Description: Optional. ListenBrainz user token from listenbrainz.org/profile/ — enables MusicBrainz ID resolution for better Lidarr matching.

Config.Name: Last.fm API Key
Config.Description: Optional. Last.fm API key from last.fm/api/account/create — enables playcounts and similar-artist discovery.

Config.Name: Last.fm Username
Config.Description: Optional. Last.fm username for scrobble history lookups.

Config.Name: External URL
Config.Description: Publicly-reachable URL for this Octave instance (e.g. your Tailscale hostname). Used by the Subsonic API to advertise the correct server address to music clients. Leave blank to fall back to the request origin.

Config.Name: Subsonic Username
Config.Description: Username for OpenSubsonic clients (Amperfy, SubStreamer, etc.). Defaults to AUTH_USERNAME if blank.

Config.Name: Subsonic Password
Config.Description: Password for OpenSubsonic clients. Must be stored in plain text so Subsonic MD5-token auth can be verified server-side. Keep this different from your Jellyfin password.
